name: Credit Repair Today
description_short: Credit Repair Today (CRT) offers credit repair, dispute services, and credit building programs with a stated guarantee to raise scores in 60-90 days and no monthly fees.
description_long:
Credit Repair Today operates under the parent company My Investment Solutions and claims 14 years in business with 30 years of combined experience in credit repair, investments, and loan processing. The company positions itself as a consumer advocate focused on educating clients about credit scoring and consumer rights. They offer free initial credit consultations by phone at 1-844-427-8482.

CRT's service portfolio includes credit repair and FCRA disputes, credit building programs, inquiry removal, tradeline rentals, a 30-day credit boost program, identity theft solutions, mortgage preparation assistance, business credit building, debt settlement/discharge, bankruptcy preparation, wage garnishment intervention, and motions to dismiss debt. They also provide access to various financial products and credit reports (both personal and business).

The company's primary distinguishing claim is a guarantee to raise credit scores in 60-90 days with no monthly fees charged—a notable positioning since many credit repair competitors use subscription models. They also promote products that claim to raise scores in under 30 days. Their service range is unusually broad, spanning personal credit, business credit, identity theft, debt management, and bankruptcy-adjacent services in a single operation.

A significant caveat: the website contains spelling errors ("CHARGE'S" instead of "CHARGES"), repeats marketing copy extensively, and makes aggressive performance guarantees ("GUARANTEE TO RAISE YOUR CREDIT SCORES IN 60-90 days") without substantiating methodology or disclaimers. The breadth of services (tradeline rentals, rapid credit boosting) and strong guarantees suggest marketing claims that may exceed what credit repair can legally deliver under FCRA and CROA regulations. No pricing, contract terms, or detailed service descriptions are provided on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No monthly fees claimed—single service model rather than ongoing subscriptions
Broad service range including credit repair, business credit, identity theft, and debt management
Free initial credit consultation by phone
14 years in business with stated 30 years combined team experience
Offers tradeline rental and 30-day credit boost products in addition to traditional disputes
Addresses mortgage qualification preparation and business credit separately
Claims to work on FCRA disputes and bankruptcy preparation
cons: Website contains spelling/grammar errors and lacks professionalism ("CHARGE'S", copyright year 2026)
Makes aggressive, unsubstantiated guarantees (60-90 day score raises) without methodology or legal disclaimers
Extremely limited service details—no explanation of dispute process, timeline, success rates, or client results
No pricing, contract terms, or fee structure disclosed despite claiming no monthly fees
Unusually broad service offering (tradeline rentals, bankruptcy prep, debt settlement, wage garnishment) raises credibility concerns about expertise depth
No independent reviews, ratings, or credentials visible on website
best_for: Consumers seeking credit repair and dispute services who want to avoid monthly subscription fees
Small business owners needing both personal and business credit improvement
Individuals preparing to apply for mortgages who want combined credit repair and mortgage readiness guidance
diagnosis: Credit Repair Today is positioned for consumers seeking non-subscription credit repair with claimed rapid results and business credit expertise. However, the website's lack of substantiation, spelling errors, unsubstantiated guarantees, and unusually broad service scope raise questions about regulatory compliance and whether claims meet CROA/FCRA standards—consultation with a consumer law resource before engaging is advisable.
services: Credit repair and dispute services (FCRA disputes)
Credit reports and DIY credit reports
Investment goal planning and financial products
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
